context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses setUUIDMetadata / getUUIDMetadata / getAllUUIDMetadata / removeUUIDMetadata, remembers to pass include.customFields: true on reads, applies a server-side filter, and notes the Admin Portal prerequisite.

checklist.name: setUUIDMetadata for upsert
checklist.description: createOrUpdateProfile calls pubnub.objects.setUUIDMetadata with the uuid and a data object containing name, email, externalId, profileUrl, and custom

checklist.name: getUUIDMetadata with customFields
checklist.description: getProfile calls pubnub.objects.getUUIDMetadata with include: { customFields: true }

checklist.name: getAllUUIDMetadata for list
checklist.description: listAdmins calls pubnub.objects.getAllUUIDMetadata (not iterates getUUIDMetadata one by one)

checklist.name: Server-side admin filter
checklist.description: listAdmins passes filter: 'custom.role == "admin"' (or equivalent matching expression) instead of filtering client-side

checklist.name: Limit on list call
checklist.description: listAdmins passes an explicit limit parameter to getAllUUIDMetadata (defaulting from the limit argument)

checklist.name: customFields on list read
checklist.description: listAdmins passes include: { customFields: true } so the returned admins have their custom data populated

checklist.name: removeUUIDMetadata for delete
checklist.description: deleteProfile calls pubnub.objects.removeUUIDMetadata with the uuid

checklist.name: Admin Portal prerequisite comment
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states that the App Context add-on must be enabled on the keyset

checklist.name: Awaits async calls
checklist.description: All pubnub.objects.* calls are awaited (or their returned promises are returned to the caller)
